word: G4216 - ποταμοφόρητος - potamophórētos - pot-am-of-or'-ay-tos - Carried away of the flood

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ποταμοφόρητος

- Transliteration: Potamophoretos

- Phonetic: pot-am-of-or'-ay-tos

- Definition:

1. carried away by a stream (i.e. overwhelmed, drowned in the waters)

- Origin: from G4215 and a derivative of G5409

- TDNT entry: 16:07,9

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G4215 and a derivative of G5409; river borne that is overwhelmed by a stream: - carried away of the flood.
